javadoc_after:
/** * Just like {@link #search(Weight, Filter, int, Sort)}, but you choose * whether or not the fields in the returned {@link FieldDoc} instances should * be set by specifying fillFields.
* NOTE: currently, this method tracks document scores and sets them in * the returned {@link FieldDoc}, however in 3.0 it will move to not track * document scores. If document scores tracking is still needed, you can use * {@link #search(Weight, Filter, Collector)} and pass in a * {@link TopFieldCollector} instance. */
